title: Shiatsu — Activities near Mas du Chanoine
description: Shiatsu: discover this activity near our guesthouse on the French Riviera.
paragraphs: Shiatsu is an energetic manual therapy that involves applying finger pressure to the body's meridians and stretching. It is based on traditional Chinese medicine and has Japanese origins.

You can enjoy in your room a session provided by Nadine, trained in Chinese medicine and acupuncture. Lying on a massage table, this session will help you reduce tension, stimulate and strengthen your immune system.
For the session, lasting one hour, you will be dressed in light clothing. It is strongly recommended that you book your Shiatsu session before your arrival.
